---
title: "The Crosswalk"
subtitle: "Field notes from the intersections of biology, data, statistics and curiosity."
---

The Crosswalk is the thinking layer of Lunaland.

These short field notes follow how data moves from observation to interpretation — and where uncertainty enters along the way.

Projects show what I build.  
The Pitfalls Lab shows where things break.  
The Concept Atlas shows how ideas connect.  

The Crosswalk shows how I think through it.

---

## Posts

### [When is a genetic association real?](posts/genetic-association-real.qmd)

A field note on why odds ratios alone are not enough — and how uncertainty and sample size shape interpretation.

**Related concepts:** Odds Ratio, Confidence Interval, Sample Size  
**Related projects:** RNA-seq Workflow Demo  
**Related app:** *When is a genetic association real?* (Shiny, coming soon)  
**Related pitfalls:** Overinterpreting small datasets *(planned)*

---

## Categories

- Evidence & Uncertainty  
- Bioinformatics Pitfalls  
- Visual Statistics  
- Cross-Discipline Curiosity  
- Scientific Communication
